use_cases: Full-page landing entry for SaaS idea generation platforms
Brainstorming interface hero for creator tools
Interactive landing page with glowing input CTA
Dark-themed product hero for creative platforms
ai_summary: A dark-themed hero section designed for idea generation applications, featuring a responsive full-screen layout with navigation, bold typography, and a glowing glass-morphism input field. The component uses purple gradients and blur effects to create an immersive brainstorming environment with hover interactions on navigation elements.
